zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Luvetot於1178年出生在英國越可爾雪菲爾時，她的父親William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire23歲，母親Marian FitzWalter18歲。她與Gerard de Furnival結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1250年在英國諾廷加姆爾沃可索普享年72歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾沃可索普。

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Luvetot was born in 1178, in Sheffield, Yorkshire, England, her father, William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire, was 23 and her mother, Marian FitzWalter, was 18. She married Gerard de Furnival. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1250, in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Luvetot est née en 1178, à Sheffield, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Marian FitzWalter, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Gerard de Furnival. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1250, à Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Luvetot 1178 in Sheffield, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire 23 und ihre Mutter Marian FitzWalter 18. Sie hat Gerard de Furnival geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1250 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Luvetot è nata il nel 1178 nel Sheffield, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Marian FitzWalter, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Gerard de Furnival. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1250, nel Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Luvetotが1178年にイギリスヨークシュアイアシェフィールドで生まれた時，父William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshireは23歳，母Marian FitzWalterは18歳であった。Gerard de Furnivalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1250年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオルクソップで72歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオルクソップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Luvetot(이)가 1178년 영국 요르크실르 셰필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marian FitzWalter(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Gerard de Furnival(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1250년 영국 노틴그함실르 워크소프에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 워크소프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Luvetot nasceu em 1178, em Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Marian FitzWalter, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Gerard de Furnival. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1250, em Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Luvetot родилась в 1178 г. в местности шеффиелд, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Marian FitzWalter, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerard de Furnival. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1250 г. в местности ворксоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности ворксоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

Murió en 1250, en Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
